title: Weyerhaeuser Company (WY) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Andy Taylor - Vice President of Investor Relations Devin Stockfish - President and CEO David Wold - Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants George Staphos - Bank of America Kurt Yinger - D.A. Davidson Susan Maklari - Goldman Sachs Mark Weintraub - Seaport Research Partners Anthony Pettinari - Citi Paul Quinn - RBC Capital Markets Ketan Mamtora - BMO Capital Markets Michael Roxland - Truist Securities Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Weyerhaeuser Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Q2 Earnings Top, Sales Miss, Fall Y/Y
text: Weyerhaeuser's (WY) second-quarter 2023 results reflect lower year-over-year segmental results but improved sequential results.

title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Weyerhaeuser (WY) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Tops Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Weyerhaeuser (WY) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.32 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.21 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.06 per share a year ago.

title: Weyerhaeuser Reports Second Quarter Results
text: Achieved net earnings of $230 million, or $0.31 per diluted share, and net earnings before special items of $238 million, or $0.32 per diluted share Generated Adjusted EBITDA of $469 million, a 19 percent increase compared with first quarter 2023 Completed strategic timberlands acquisition in Mississippi in July 2023 SEATTLE , July 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) today reported second quarter net earnings of $230 million, or 31 cents per diluted share, on net sales of $2.0 billion. This compares with net earnings of $788 million, or $1.06 per diluted share, on net sales of $3.0 billion for the same period last year and net earnings of $151 million for first quarter 2023.

title: Factors Setting the Tone for Weyerhaeuser's (WY) Q2 Earnings
text: Slow construction activities, higher raw material costs and lower lumber and OSB pricing are likely to have reflected on Weyerhaeuser's (WY) second-quarter results from a year ago.
